channel.title: Gitlab on 天晴小猪
channel.description: Recent content in Gitlab on 天晴小猪

item.title: 安装GitLab
item.description: 更新yum源 备份原有的yum源 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# mv CentOS-Base.repo CentOS-Base.repo.bak_20180611 拷贝到目录下 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# mv /opt/program/Centos-7.repo ./CentOS-Base.repo 删除原有yum缓存 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# yum clean all 已加载插件：fastestmirror 正在清理软件源： base extras updates Cleaning up everything Maybe you want: rm -rf /var/cache/yum, to also free up space taken by orphaned data from disabled or removed repos Cleaning up list of fastest mirrors 重新生成yum缓存 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# yum makecache 已加载插件：fastestmirror .
